name: Victory Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in the corn syrup and egg yolks. Beat in vanilla extract.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with coffee to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cake batter.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
9. Cool the cake in the pan on a rack.
